about.heading: About Hoag Land Services
about.subheading: Local, experienced land services in Central Florida.

sections.heading: Our story
sections.body: HLS officially came to life in 2019 by CEO Tyler Hoag however, the foundation was built many years before. With over a decade of experience in the utility forestry and construction sector our intention and direction for HLS became clear.

The business began as a single tractor service serving residential clients in the greater DeLand area. With time, opportunity, and education, HLS has grown into a certified arborist tree service and a full site service. HLS is supported by knowledgeable, driven and durable team members who surpass customer expectations.

cta.label: Ready to walk through your property?

services.heading: Central Florida • Residential & Commercial
services.intro: Site services, tree services, and fencing services for residential and commercial properties across Central Florida.

categories.title: Site Services
items: Land Clearing: from an acre to hundreds of acres
Earth works and Excavation: Soil removal and replacement, grading, building pads, roads, ponds, Right of ways
Erosion Control: Installation and maintenance of silt fences, swales and culverts
Environmental services: Forestry mulching/mowing, invasive tree mitigation, herbicide treatments, right of way wet land access and roads

categories.title: Tree Services
items: Tree Trimming: Removal of weak, dead or dying limbs
Tree installation: Palms, hard woods, evergreens

categories.title: Fence Services
items: Wood: board, privacy, barbed wire, field, horse fence

footer_cta.label: Have a similar project in mind? Start a conversation.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: Tell us a little about your property and what you're hoping to accomplish. We will follow up to ask any additional questions and schedule a time to walk the property if needed.
contact.service_area_note: We are based near DeLand and typically serve: DeLand & DeLeon Springs, Surrounding rural Central Florida areas, Residential neighborhoods and acreage properties.
contact.direct_contact_note: If you reach us after hours, leave a brief message with your name, property location, and what you're looking to do.

fields.name: message
fields.label: How can we help?
fields.hint: A few details about the property size, access, and your goals are helpful.

join.heading: Join Our Team
join.intro: We are always interested in connecting with dependable people who take pride in their work and respect customers' properties.
join.process_note: We review submissions as needed based on current and upcoming projects. If there is a potential fit, we will reach out to talk more about your experience and next steps.
